title: Closeout Step 9d: health-check.jsonl template does not exist — skip is expected
signal: Step 9d loads templates/health-check.jsonl. This file does not exist in the framework. Every spoke logs a spurious 'file not found' error every session. Fix: annotate Step 9d — template is intentionally absent until created. Skip is expected, not an error. Log 'Step 9d: health-check.jsonl not found, skipping.'
